name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, full-grain leather, small hand-stitched, classic turn-lock on both sides. Suede lining in the same color, two compartments separated by hard partitions, interior pocket with button and vintage gold metal fittings. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*9.5*21cm
